nodes.name: Golden-winged cacique
nodes.summary: Golden-winged cacique（Cacicus chrysopterus）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如Golden-winged cacique。

nodes.name: Cacicus
nodes.summary: Cacicus（Cacicus）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联10种鸟类，如Solitary cacique、Golden-winged cacique、Ecuadorian cacique等10种鸟类。

nodes.name: Golden-winged cacique
nodes.summary: The golden-winged cacique (Cacicus chrysopterus) is a species of bird in the family Icteridae. It is found in Argentina, Bolivia, Brazil, Paraguay, and Uruguay. Its natural habitats are subtropical or tropical moist lowland forests and subtropical or tropical moist montane forests. References
